title: LicenseGuard
intent: OSS license governance and usage policy enforcement across repositories
requirements: inventory module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
rules module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
issues module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
attribution module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
approvals module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
sbom module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
